metadata.historicalFigureDisclosure: AI-generated historical interpretation of Benjamin Franklin. This is not an authentic likeness, archival recording, endorsement, or recreation of his voice.
metadata.caption: Benjamin Franklin — printer, writer, inventor, and civic builder. A really cool historical dude. AI-generated historical interpretation with a built-in AI narrator.
metadata.voiceDisclosure: Built-in AI narrator — not Benjamin Franklin’s voice.
metadata.transcript: Thanks for using Morrowward. Dave asked for a little encouragement. Benjamin Franklin wrote, “Little strokes fell great oaks.” Small weekly steps can shape a long horizon.
metadata.directQuoteAttribution: Quote: Benjamin Franklin · Poor Richard Improved, 1750 · Founders Online · View source

source.author: Benjamin Franklin
source.normalizationNote: The spoken quotation normalizes capitalization, the archival line break, and the comma; its wording and word order are unchanged.
source.usage: The narration uses the normalized spoken rendering declared in directQuote; all surrounding words are original Morrowward copy.

playback.reducedMotionBehavior: Show the approved poster image and do not start playback automatically.

hardGates: Provider MIME and decoded magic bytes agree; file opens at expected resolution.
Exactly one adult person with one head, two arms, and two correctly attached natural hands.
No pseudo-text, logos, watermarks, unexpected symbols, extra people, duplicated objects, or impossible geometry.
No financial return promise, individualized advice, urgency, endorsement, or implication that recovery is guaranteed.
Historical interpretation disclosure, direct-quote attribution, source citation, caption, transcript, built-in narrator disclosure, and captions remain attached.

Any facial motion is minor and incidental rather than synchronized to the narration; the interface clearly identifies a separate verified xAI built-in narrator, never a clone, impersonation, or claim that Benjamin Franklin is speaking.
Video has a stable poster frame, no flashes, no aggressive motion, and remains understandable without audio or autoplay.

scorecard.label: Anatomy, materials, lighting, and motion craft
